# opencode-cli-mcp

MCP server wrapping [opencode](https://opencode.ai/) CLI into FastMCP tools with a FastAPI REST bridge and Vite/React dashboard. Enables AI agents to delegate implementation tasks to opencode.

## Quick Start

```powershell
uv sync
uv run python -m api.main      # Backend :10951
cd web_sota && npm run dev     # Frontend :10950
opencode serve --port 4096     # opencode HTTP API
```

## Ports

- 10950 — Frontend (Vite React)
- 10951 — Backend (FastAPI REST + MCP HTTP /mcp)
- 4096 — opencode serve HTTP API

## Architecture

MCP Clients → opencode-cli-mcp (stdio) → opencode serve (:4096) → opencode agent

## Key Files

- `src/opencode_cli_mcp/` — FastMCP server (9 tools)
- `api/main.py` — FastAPI REST bridge
- `api/routes/` — Capabilities, fleet, proxy, settings, system, tools
- `web_sota/` — Vite/React/Tailwind dashboard

## Dependencies

- Python 3.13, FastMCP 3.2.4, FastAPI 0.136.1
- Node 24, Vite 5.4, React 19, TailwindCSS 3.4
